title: RHO Trace Line (NDJSON)
description: Schema for a single line in rho_trace.ndjson. Each line is one JSON object. The file is append-only.

mu_Delta.description: Gap margin at step t. mu_Delta = (Delta(t) - Delta_floor) / Delta_floor.

mu_Pi.description: Projector integrity margin at step t. mu_Pi = (eps_Pi - drift_Pi(t)) / eps_Pi.

mu_CFL.description: CFL / goodness-of-fit margin at step t. mu_CFL = R2(t) - R2_floor.

mu_Lyap.description: Lyapunov margin at step t. mu_Lyap = M(t) - M_floor.

mu_Z.description: Autocorrelation / Z-score margin at step t. mu_Z = (Z_max - |Z(t)|) / Z_max.

rho.description: Strict-min viability score at step t: rho(t) = min(mu_Delta, mu_Pi, mu_CFL, mu_Lyap, mu_Z). System is viable iff rho(t) > 0.
